title: limeum humile
intro: Limeum humile, also known as dwarf lime or creeping lime, is a small, annual or perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Limeum humile include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain. Herbal preparations of Limeum humile can be consumed as teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
